model.local_data_pipeline.risk_score_ave.name: risk_score_average
model.local_data_pipeline.risk_score_ave.description: Top 3 receiving_address com maior amount, considerando apenas a transação mais recente (por timestamp) com transaction_type igual a 'sale' de cada endereço.

model.local_data_pipeline.amount.name: amount
model.local_data_pipeline.amount.description: Ranking de regiões geográficas pela média de risk score das transações. Útil para identificar regiões com maior concentração de risco sistêmico.

model.local_data_pipeline.stg_fraud__tra.name: stg_fraud__transactions
model.local_data_pipeline.stg_fraud__tra.description: Staging de transações de fraude brutas. Realiza casts de tipo e elimina valores inválidos no campo amount antes de expor os dados para a camada marts.

source.local_data_pipeline.iceberg_wareh.name: fraud_raw

model_runs.name: risk_score_average
model_runs.compiled_code:
with sales as (
    select
        receiving_address,
        amount,
        timestamp
    from "fraud_warehouse"."main"."stg_fraud__transactions"
    where transaction_type = 'sale'
      and amount is not null
),

most_recent_per_address as (
    select
        receiving_address,
        amount,
        timestamp,
        row_number() over (
            partition by receiving_address
            order by timestamp desc
        ) as rn
    from sales
)

select
    receiving_address,
    amount,
    timestamp
from most_recent_per_address
where rn = 1
order by amount desc
limit 3

model_runs.name: stg_fraud__transactions
model_runs.compiled_code:
with source_data as (
    select * from iceberg_scan('/warehouse/default/fraud_raw')
)

select
    cast(timestamp as bigint) as timestamp,
    cast(sending_address as varchar) as sending_address,
    cast(receiving_address as varchar) as receiving_address,
    cast(amount as double) as amount,
    cast(transaction_type as varchar) as transaction_type,
    cast(location_region as varchar) as location_region,
    cast(ip_prefix as varchar) as ip_prefix,
    cast(login_frequency as int) as login_frequency,
    cast(session_duration as int) as session_duration,
    cast(purchase_pattern as varchar) as purchase_pattern,
    cast(age_group as varchar) as age_group,
    cast(risk_score as double) as risk_score,
    cast(anomaly as varchar) as anomaly,
    cast(year as int) as year,
    cast(month as int) as month,
    cast(day as int) as day,
    cast(dagrun_id as varchar) as dagrun_id
from source_data

model_runs.name: amount
model_runs.compiled_code:
with base as (
    select
        location_region,
        avg(try_cast(risk_score as double)) as avg_risk_score
    from "fraud_warehouse"."main"."stg_fraud__transactions"
    where location_region is not null
    group by location_region
)

select
    location_region,
    round(avg_risk_score, 4) as avg_risk_score
from base
order by avg_risk_score desc
